title: Implement model-assisted journey repair

environment.os: Windows local; source-bound CI and live GPT-5.6 Sol run pending

commands.name: Missing journey-repair domain

commands.expectedFailure: The focused unit suite failed to import the not-yet-created journey-repair module

commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/journey-repair-adapter.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The focused adapter suite failed to import the not-yet-created runner repair adapter

commands.name: Undefined repair and unresolved recovery stories
commands.expectedFailure: Both RUN-04 scenarios reported fourteen undefined steps before their isolated-browser bindings existed

commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/journey-repair.test.ts tests/integration/deterministic-replay-persistence.test.ts

commands.name: Optimized-production bounded and unresolved repair stories
Repair source, workflow, and test type and lint gates
Evidence inventory required RUN-04 ownership
commands.expectedFailure: The evidence checker rejected five orphan RUN-04 test files before this in-progress manifest claimed them

commands.name: Forged hash-valid repair envelope crossed the frozen boundary
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/journey-repair.test.ts tests/unit/journey-repair-adapter.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Both regressions proved that a forged bounded envelope could alter the frozen checkpoint assertion, execute browser operations, and produce a promoted replay

commands.name: Database trusted a fabricated verified-checkpoint summary
commands.expectedFailure: PostgreSQL accepted a VERIFIED_DRAFT payload whose checkpoint summary named the frozen checkpoint while its actual checkpoint array was empty

commands.name: Frozen-source runtime and promotion hardening
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/journey-repair.test.ts tests/unit/journey-repair-adapter.test.ts

commands.name: Complete deterministic repository gate after authority-boundary hardening

scenarios.scenario: A bounded model repair stays draft until the original checkpoint is verified and a person promotes it
An unrepairable path remains not tested and cannot be promoted

visualEvidence.rationale: RUN-04 is still in progress. Browser captures exist only as local raw artifacts; source-bound deterministic and live screenshots plus sanitized traces are required before completion and are not yet claimed as proof.

proofs.description: Bounded draft assessment, exact checkpoint verification, human-only promotion, and append-only in-memory and PostgreSQL history
Database-enforced model provenance, frozen repair scope, deterministic verification, human promotion, and immutable history
Executed trusted-control observation and deterministic path/selector candidate derivation
Bounded diff, scope-review, missing-checkpoint, and named-human promotion examples
Executed control-to-replay candidate contract and ambiguity rejection
Seeded PROP-05 authorization, operation, binding, checkpoint, and promotion invariants
Real isolated-browser drift discovery, fresh deterministic checkpoint verification, recorder visibility, and unresolved path
Append-only repair draft, verification, replay, and promotion history in memory and PostgreSQL
Successful bounded repair and unresolved-not-tested recovery stories
Isolated source drift, model discovery, shared-recorder verification, human promotion, and evidence capture bindings
Required opt-in GPT-5.6 Sol repair against the seeded interface drift with deterministic verification
No-main opt-in live repair workflow with encrypted key and explicit sanitized upload allowlist
Current deterministic proof, pending live and source-bound evidence gates, and bounded claim

knownLimitations: The required source-bound live GPT-5.6 Sol repair has not run yet, so RUN-04 is not complete.
Current deterministic coverage proves one seeded relative-path and selector change plus one outage; it does not establish repair effectiveness on arbitrary products.
A verified repair remains a draft until a named human appends the deterministic replay version; scope-changing proposals never enter the same replay lineage.
A verified named test is not evidence of safety, compliance, or behavior outside the frozen checkpoint scope.
